item.title: 达斯·维达 (Darth Vader) 教我算牌和人工智能安全如何变得奇怪
item.summary: It only took a little prompting to hijack the biggest AI models - Researcher Dave Kuszmar discovered multiple systemic vulnerabilities that let him bypass LLM safety and obtain dangerous instructions. - These exploits worked across nearly all major LLMs revealing an industry-widesecurity problem. - Kuszmar calls for sl
